name: stitch-google-ai
description: A local Codex plugin for Google Stitch design workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Google Stitch for AI-assisted UI design workflows.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin that helps Codex route UI design, prototype, design-system, and Stitch handoff requests through Google Stitch workflows.
defaultPrompt: Create a Stitch prompt for this app screen.
Turn this UI idea into a Stitch design brief.
Make a DESIGN.md from this app style.
